antipattern.reason: Django 2+ rejects; older code accumulates silent CASCADE that may not be intended.

antipattern.description: `status = CharField(max_length=20)` with values managed by docstring.
antipattern.reason: Drift; typos pass validation; translations impossible.

antipattern.description: `User.create_with_org()` performing two writes inside the model.
antipattern.reason: Cross-model logic on a model produces circular deps; harder to test.
Same anti-pattern as r5 — service-layer logic in the wrong place.

antipattern.description: Composite filter (user, status, created_at) with no Meta.indexes.
antipattern.reason: Full scan on production queries; first slow-query alert blames the table.
